import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut nums = [0, 0]
  mut idx = 0
  while idx < 2
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          i = i + 1
        else
          i = n + 1
        end
      when None
        i = n
      end
    end
    if i > n
      i = i - n - 1
    end
    mut sign = 1
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      else
        i = i
      end
    when None
      i = i
    end
    mut val = 0
    mut reading = true
    while reading
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b >= 48 and b <= 57
          val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
          i = i + 1
        else
          reading = false
        end
      when None
        reading = false
      end
    end
    nums = [if idx == 0 then val * sign else nums[0] end, if idx == 1 then val * sign else nums[1] end]
    idx = idx + 1
  end
  let a = nums[0]
  let b = nums[1]
  let r = a * a + b * b
  print("r=#{r}")
end
